evals.prompt: Finish the existing Angular customer-details component that was migrated from ADF. The template already exists, but the TypeScript file is missing the logic that disables the address fields until a customer type is selected and does not yet load the route model correctly.
evals.expected_output: An updated component that preserves file boundaries, completes the business logic, and implements the input enablement rules without touching unrelated files.

evals.prompt: Improve the migrated Angular order-form component so that it uses the original ADF business rules to toggle date fields and submit availability based on the form status.
evals.expected_output: A type-safe component implementation that completes the missing logic and field state handling while preserving the existing component structure.
